## Motivation and Context
## Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` document.
- [ ] I have run `make format` to apply formatting standards.
- [ ] I have run `make lint` and it passes cleanly.
- [ ] I have run `make typecheck` and Mypy passes without errors.
- [ ] I have run `make test` and maintained 100% test coverage.
- [ ] I have run `make mutate` and 0 mutants survived.
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
